description:
Testing-review M4. json_streamer_test only uses a capturing Agent sink that always succeeds. No coverage for a sink that fails mid-stream (disk full, closed device, permission denied on the --json path opened in stream_sink/2). One line per site over a long run makes a mid-stream sink failure a realistic operational event; partial-write behaviour is untested (clean abort vs crash-and-lose-results is unknown).

Files: lib/mutagen_ex/json_streamer.ex; test/mutagen_ex/json_streamer_test.exs.

Fix: inject a failing sink and assert the documented degradation.

Done: failing-sink behaviour pinned by a test.
title: M4: json_streamer sink-write-failure coverage
